title: Meteor Way
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Meteor Way''' was a street in [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]] located near the [[Coronet City Spaceport/Legends|Coronet City Spaceport]] and intersecting with [[Treasure Ship Row/Legends|Treasure Ship Row]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1998-06-30 -->''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
